zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Pulford於1348年7月1日出生在英國爾普爾福德時，她的父親Sir Robert de Pulford26歲，母親Jane de Pulford24歲。她於1372年與Robert le Grosvenor在英國爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1396年12月31日在英國爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德享年48歲，埋葬在英國爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Pulford于1348年7月1日出生在英国爾普爾福德时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Pulford26岁，母亲Jane de Pulford24岁。她于1372年与Robert le Grosvenor在英国爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1396年12月31日在英国爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德享年48岁，埋葬在英国爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pulford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pulford in Cheshire, so called from Old English pōl ‘pool, pond’ or perhaps pull ‘pool, creek’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Pulford was born on 1 July 1348, in Pulford, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Robert de Pulford, was 26 and her mother, Jane de Pulford, was 24. She married Robert le Grosvenor in 1372, in Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 31 December 1396, in Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Pulford est née le 1 juillet 1348, à Pulford, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Pulford, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane de Pulford, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Robert le Grosvenor en 1372, à Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 décembre 1396, à Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Pulford am 1. Juli 1348 in Pulford, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Pulford 26 und ihre Mutter Jane de Pulford 24. Sie hat 1372 in Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England Robert le Grosvenor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Dezember 1396 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England und wurde in Cheshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Robert le Grosvenor nel 1372, nel Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 31 dicembre 1396, nel Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Pulfordが1348年7月1日にイギリスチェシュアイアプウルフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Pulfordは26歳，母Jane de Pulfordは24歳であった。1372年にイギリスチェシュアイアハルメ ワルフィールドでRobert le Grosvenorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1396年12月31日にイギリスチェシュアイアハルメ ワルフィールドで48歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Pulford(이)가 1348년 7월 1일 영국 체실르 풀퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Pulford(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane de Pulford(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1372년 영국 체실르 훌 월필드에서 Robert le Grosvenor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1396년 12월 31일 영국 체실르 훌 월필드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Pulford nasceu em 1 de julho de 1348, em Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Pulford, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jane de Pulford, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert le Grosvenor em 1372, em Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1396, em Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Pulford родилась 1 июля 1348 г. в местности пулфорд, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Pulford было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane de Pulford, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert le Grosvenor в 1372 г. в местности хулм валфиелд, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 31 декабря 1396 г. в местности хулм валфиелд, чешир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности чешир, Англия.
